description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with clean lines and a flat, multi-level roof structure. The exterior is primarily white with sections of textured gray stone and large glass windows, providing a sleek and contemporary appearance. The roof surfaces are a muted red, contrasting with the white walls and adding visual interest. The front facade includes a prominent entryway with a wooden door and a paved walkway leading up to it, flanked by a mix of stone and glass elements. Windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some large panes and others smaller, contributing to the modern aesthetic. The house sits on a rectangular green lawn, with a driveway extending from the front to the street.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat red roof, white walls, textured stone accents, and large asymmetrical windows, set on a green lawn with a paved driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, paved walkway, textured stone accent wall, and large glass windows.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the extended driveway, flat roof sections, and a mix of window sizes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade with a smaller entry, more windows, and the continuation of the red roof.
description_view_3: Right side view featuring the prominent stone wall, additional windows, and the side extension of the driveway.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large and small panes
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a wooden door, paved walkway, and stone accent wall, no porch or columns
